name: Danmaku Girl
short_description: Danmaku Girl is a puzzle 2D platformer combining platform-jumping and bullet-shooting. Strategically use 11 danmaku skills to conquer 40+ levels through environmental interactions, enemy pattern analysis, and terrain challenges.
detailed_description:
Danmaku Girl​​ is a puzzle-centric 2D platformer that blends platform-jumping and bullet-shooting elements. Players must conquer 40+ levels by strategically selecting and combining 11 danmaku skills, leveraging environmental interactions, analyzing enemy attack patterns, and overcoming diverse terrain challenges to successfully clear each stage.

In search of her missing dog, the girl Sibi unexpectedly becomes entangled in a crisis threatening the world's survival. On this journey filled with unknowns, she will harness the mysterious power of "Danmaku"—freely combining various Danmaku abilities to navigate intricate terrains and outmaneuver formidable foes. Each choice and combination of abilities will determine whether she can overcome adversity and find her lost companion...
